headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: Section 21. If the Subcontractor deems that surfaces or work to which the Subcontract Work is to be applied or affixed is unsatisfactory or unsuitable, written notification of said condition shall be given to the Contractor prior to commencement of such Subcontract Work, otherwise Subcontractor shall be responsible for any and all damage to the Subcontract Work arising out of such unsatisfactory or unsuitable condition.
